lyme_face: Extra immune and detox support for those who haven't recovered on standard protocols.
lyme_body: Most cases of Lyme can be treated with antibiotics and herbs, but a subset of people don't improve on the standard approach — antibiotics help at first, then lose their effect or cause side effects. These patients often need extra support for their immune and detoxification systems to help the body clear latent or chronic infections. Combining integrative and functional medicine with conventional therapy can help those with Lyme and co-infections recover and live healthy lives.
mold_face: Personalized detoxification for mold sensitivity, matched to your biochemistry.
mold_body: Mold is so common in our modern world that many people don't realize how much it affects their health. For those who are sensitive or genetically predisposed, mold and its toxins can cause disabling symptoms and, if unaddressed, lead to major health problems. Because so many people are affected differently, care means looking deeper into your individual ability to detoxify and customizing the plan to your biochemistry — rather than following one traditional method.
long-covid_face: A systems-based approach to lingering post-COVID symptoms.
long-covid_body: Long COVID may be the next rising chronic illness, and conventional treatments are lacking because what's required is a systems-based approach that sees the whole body — not a single pill. Looking at microclotting, vascular and mitochondrial health, reactivation of latent infections, the integrity of the gut lining, and toxic load is key. With persistent effort, those with Long COVID or Post-Acute COVID Syndrome have a real chance of recovery and living a normal life again.
chronic-fatigue_face: Finding the inflammation behind fatigue, brain fog, and body pain.
chronic-fatigue_body: These can be debilitating, and conventional medicine often has little to offer beyond temporarily reducing symptoms. Using a functional-medicine, systems-based approach, the underlying source of chronic inflammation can be found and addressed — bringing health and balance to body and mind so the symptoms no longer have a hold on your life. Adding IV therapies to restore mitochondrial function and support detoxification further strengthens the body's ability to heal.
mcas_face: Tracking down triggers behind unexplained allergic and inflammatory symptoms.
mcas_body: Severe allergic responses, blood-pressure swings, sensitivities to foods and chemicals, rashes, digestive issues, brain fog, and trouble concentrating are all part of the constellation known as MCAS. Addressing the root cause takes investigation to find where the triggers are coming from. A conventional approach combined with nutrition, supplements, and lifestyle changes can help those with MCAS live more normal, productive lives.
autoimmune_face: Hashimoto's, lupus, RA, Crohn's, ulcerative colitis, and MS.
autoimmune_body: Autoimmune disease is on the rise. The conventional approach is effective at suppressing symptoms and inflammation, but works even better combined with functional medicine that looks at the underlying triggers of autoimmunity and drivers of inflammation — the gut microbiome, stress, toxins, and hidden infections. When that source of inflammation is discovered and the strain is taken off the immune system, the body can, in many cases, find its balance again.
metabolic_face: Obesity, diabetes, stubborn weight, and heart health.
metabolic_body: Obesity, metabolic syndrome, and diabetes are leading causes of illness worldwide, driven by a diet and lifestyle that promote weight gain. When you diet and exercise and still can't lose weight, something underlying is getting in the way. Cardiovascular disease is the number-one killer in the U.S. — yet many heart attacks and strokes can be prevented with proper testing and targeted diet, exercise, and supplements. It's an investment in your future.
digestive_face: Restoring the gut microbiome at the foundation of whole-body health.
digestive_body: All health begins with the digestive system's ability to properly absorb nutrients from food. The interplay between the gut microbiome and the immune system is well studied and now understood to be central to overall health and vitality. Most chronic illnesses involve an imbalanced gut microbiome somewhere in the disease process, and addressing it is a critical part of recovery.
brain-health_face: Addressing brain fog, focus, and mitochondrial fatigue.
brain-health_body: Brain fog, difficulty focusing, and fatigue can all be signs of low-level brain inflammation, neurochemical imbalance, and mitochondrial fatigue in the central nervous system. When the brain starts to deteriorate, the signs are subtle and easily missed — which is why it helps to work with a professional to repair your mitochondria and recover your ability to think and function as you want to.
mens-health_face: Restoring energy, strength, and vitality — beyond hormones alone.
mens-health_body: As men age, hormone levels fall and that once-trusted vigor gradually wanes. Restoring a sense of vitality takes more than hormone replacement — it comes from a comprehensive lifestyle assessment and plan that addresses the food we eat, how we move, and what we put into our bodies, to recover the energy and strength of youth.
oncology_face: IV nutritional support to ease side effects during cancer treatment.
oncology_body: Cancer treatment can be difficult to endure. IV nutritional therapy offers support that can minimize side effects and improve outcomes for patients undergoing conventional chemotherapy, radiation, and surgery. Many patients find they tolerate treatment better when it's combined with dietary and lifestyle changes plus IV nutritional therapy — and feel it enhances their overall quality of life and treatment experience.
co_intro: Dr. Kanani works especially with people who have been told their labs are “normal” while they continue to feel unwell. These are the areas where a root-cause, systems-based approach makes the biggest difference.
